captured_from: Public AWS Bedrock Titan Text invoke-model docs.

examples.notes: Bedrock Titan Text /invoke: bare-shape provider response. Per-result tokenCount is the OUTPUT count for that result (Titan does n=1 typically). completionReason values: FINISH/LENGTH/CONTENT_FILTERED. Titan does not return a total_tokens field; downstream code computes from input + sum of result tokenCounts.
